text: During conflicts at this province, each participating character your opponent controls cannot be chosen as the target of an event and cannot have an attachment played on it if that card shares a clan affiliation with the character.
name: Conflict Between Kin

text: Interrupt: When the effects of a triggered ability would initiate during a conflict at this province - cancel those effects.
flavorText: If would only be a matter of time before Kuwanan came searching for his sister's seal. It was Sadako's duty that he find it.
name: Effective Deception

text: Keeper role only. Action: During a conflict at this province, choose an attachment on an attacking character - discard that attachment.
name: Into the Forbidden City

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a card in a dynasty discard pile - put that card on the bottom of its owner's dynasty deck.
flavorText: "I knew there was much to Rokugan that we must defend. I never realized how much of it was beautiful."
name: Hida Sugi

text: If you control Doji Kuwanan, discard him. Reaction: After an opponent plays a card during a conflict in which this character is participating - gain 1 honor. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "Do you believe the Emerald Magistrates lie, brother, or that they are simply incompetent?"
name: Doji Hotaru

text: If you control Doji Hotaru, discard her. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with lower [conflict-military] skill than this character - bow that character.
flavorText: "I begin to suspect you don't even care about the truth."
name: Doji Kuwanan

text: Reaction: After you gain fate from a ring during a conflict in which this character is participating - draw 1 card.
flavorText: "I am privileged that you would seek my insights in uncovering the truth of such a bizarre matter."
name: Trusted Advisor

text: Reaction: After you win a [conflict-political] conflict - look at 3 random cards in your opponent's hand.
flavorText: "You will find I am only interested in the truth." - Kitsuki Jusai
name: Court of Justice

text: While you have fewer cards in your hand than an opponent, this character gets +2[conflict-military].
flavorText: "One does not achieve victory by holding forces in reserve." - Akodo's Leadership
name: Matsu Swiftspear

text: While you have fewer cards in your hand than an opponent, characters you control cannot receive dishonored status tokens.
flavorText: The City of the Rich Frog receives goods from all over Rokugan for trade. Whether the caretaking of those goods is meant to be overseen by the Lion, the Dragon, or the Unicorn depends upon who you ask.
name: Steward of the Rich Frog

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a participating character and select one - that character either gains or loses pride until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: The fortune of accomplishment expects - and rewards - only excellence.
name: Acolyte of Koyane

text: Reaction: After you play a Water card, choose a character - switch that character's base [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill until the end of the phase.
flavorText: "How can you not find beauty in water's frozen crystal?"
name: Isawa Heiko

text: Disguised Courtier. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - remove 1 fate from each other participating character.
flavorText: So long as they fear the knife's subtlety, you can trust you will remain safe in court.
name: Shosuro Ibuki

text: Reaction: After you play this character from your provinces - look at the top 5 cards of your dynasty deck. You may put a character with cost 2 or lower from among those cards into play. Discard the rest.
flavorText: "March divided. Attack united." - from the tactics of Shinjo Khulan Khan
name: Shinjo Gunsō

text: Action: During the dynasty phase - play two characters from your provinces. Then, turn a card in your provinces faceup.
name: Wayfarer's Camp

text: Forced Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends - each player must sacrifice a dishonored character, if able.
flavorText: The wardens who attend to the Damned are as ruthless as they are courgaeous. They must stand ready to cut down the very companions whose humanity they seek to preserve.
name: Warden of the Damned

text: Attach to a unique character. Restricted. Reaction: After you break a province during a [conflict-military] conflict in which attached character is attacking - discard each card from each of your opponent's provinces.
name: Callous Ashigaru

text: Attach to a Courtier character. Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. Dishonor the duel's loser. If that character is already dishonored, bow it. If it is already bowed and dishonored, discard it."
name: Justicar's Approach

text: Action: During a conflict, discard a card from your hand - attached character gets +3[conflict-military] and +3[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: Even in peace, the warrioir's mind cannot rest.
name: Sharpen the Mind

text: Attach to a character you control. Action: During a conflict, if you have the [element-water] ring claimed - move attached character to the conflict or home from the conflict. (Limit twice per round.)
name: Stride the Waves

text: Disguised non-[clan-scorpion] character. This character can only be played by the disguised keyword. Reaction: After you play this character, choose a non-unique character an opponent controls - dishonor that character.
name: Shosuro Miyako

text: Action: During a conflict - each non-unique character you control gets +1[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: It was only by adopting the tactics of their assailants that the Ki-Rin Clan survived their journey across the Plain of Wind and Stone.
name: Ujik Tactics
